title: GitHub IdP MFA Correlation
description: Dashboard for correlating IdP MFA success with GitHub audit-log login activity.

panels.title: Matched GitHub logins with prior IdP MFA
panels.query: index=$github_index$ action IN (org.login, saml_authentication, oauth_authorization) | eval user=coalesce(user, actor) | join type=left user [ search index=$idp_index$ (mfa_result=success OR mfa_satisfied=true OR mfa_status=success) | eval user=coalesce(user, principal, username, upn, email) | eval idp_time=_time | fields user idp_time auth_method mfa_result mfa_satisfied ] | eval delta_seconds=abs(_time-idp_time) | where isnotnull(idp_time) AND delta_seconds<=900 | table _time user action auth_method mfa_result idp_time delta_seconds

panels.title: Unmatched GitHub login-like events
panels.query: index=$github_index$ action IN (org.login, saml_authentication, oauth_authorization) | eval user=coalesce(user, actor) | join type=left user [ search index=$idp_index$ (mfa_result=success OR mfa_satisfied=true OR mfa_status=success) | eval user=coalesce(user, principal, username, upn, email) | eval idp_time=_time | fields user idp_time ] | where isnull(idp_time) | table _time user action repo org

panels.title: GitHub auth events by user
panels.query: index=$github_index$ action IN (org.login, saml_authentication, oauth_authorization, credential_authorization) | eval user=coalesce(user, actor) | stats count by user | sort - count

panels.title: IdP MFA success trend
panels.query: index=$idp_index$ (mfa_result=success OR mfa_satisfied=true OR mfa_status=success) | timechart span=1h count

panels.title: Potential gaps
panels.query: index=$github_index$ action IN (org.login, saml_authentication, oauth_authorization) | eval user=coalesce(user, actor) | join type=left user [ search index=$idp_index$ (mfa_result=success OR mfa_satisfied=true OR mfa_status=success) | eval user=coalesce(user, principal, username, upn, email) | fields user ] | where isnull(user_1) | stats count

notes: GitHub Enterprise audit logs can be streamed to external data management systems, and the audit-log API can be used for retrieval.
Adjust index names and auth field names to match your deployment.
Use the IdP export schema emitted by your Azure AD / Okta pipeline for exact field mapping.
